privileged_info_summary: The target dataset consists of real observation images from the ESO Very Large Telescope (VLT) focusing on Messier 12 (NGC 6218), downloaded from the ESA Hubble FITS Liberator archive. The task requires calculating a synthetic green channel from the B and V bands using the mathematical formula (B+V)/2. The expected outputs are a synthetic green FITS file at /home/ga/AstroImages/outreach/synthetic_green.fits and a merged RGB image with the base path /home/ga/AstroImages/outreach/m12_color_composite.
